info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and integrating Ecommerce build-time operations including product catalog, orders, and user management.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog management.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Operations related to order processing and management.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Operations related to user account creation and management.

post.description: Register a new user by providing the necessary user details. The request body must contain valid user information. Upon success, returns the created user details.

example.message: The provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Place a new order on behalf of a user identified by userId. This operation creates the order and returns the order details upon success.

400.description: Invalid order details or user ID

example.message: The provided order data or user ID is invalid.
No user found for the given userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific order using the unique orderId. Returns the order information if found.

example.message: The order ID provided is invalid.
No order found with the given orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. The request body must contain details about the item to add. Returns the updated cart contents.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to cart

example.message: The cart item data provided is not valid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the current cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents for the user identified by userId. Returns all items currently in the cart.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current tracking status and details for the specified order by its unique identifier. Returns shipment progress, estimated delivery date, and other tracking info to keep customers informed.

example.message: No shipping information found for the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or is invalid

500.description: Internal server error processing tracking request.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and add a new product entry in the product catalog with details such as name, description, price, and inventory. Upon success, the newly created product information will be returned.

requestBody.description: Product details to be added to the catalog.

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings.

400.description: Invalid request data for product creation.

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU or name already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint to receive and process payment status webhook events from external payment providers. Accepts payment event data to update transaction status within the system.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload sent by payment provider containing payment event details.

example.message: Webhook payload format is invalid or missing required fields.
The payment was declined by the provider.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process for a given order or service with required payment information such as amount, payment method, and billing details. Returns payment transaction details upon success.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request data including amount and payment method details.

example.message: Payment request has invalid or missing fields.
The payment was declined by the payment processor.

500.description: Internal server error during payment initiation.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response message received from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Identifier for the payment transaction assigned by the payment provider.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total order amount before any discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the amounts in the order.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount payable by the user after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status for the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

country.description: Country of the user based on their profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created in ISO 8601 format.

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code preferred by the user for transactions.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is currently active.

userType.description: Classification of the user account type.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product, from 0 to 5.

available.description: Availability status of the product in stock.

description.description: Detailed description of the product features and specifications.
description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and long battery life.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

brand.description: Brand or manufacturer of the product.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product.

price.description: Original price of one unit of the product before discount.

discount.description: Discount applied to one unit of the product.

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status update.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date of the order in ISO 8601 format.

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Sum of all discounts applied to the cart items.

currency.description: Currency code for all monetary values.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount payable after applying discounts.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart in ISO 8601 format.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal

currency.description: Currency code according to ISO 4217 standards

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway processing the transaction

country.description: Country of the user, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

userType.description: Type of user account, such as admin, customer or guest

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Order identifier related to the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

currency.description: Currency in which the payment was made

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created in the system

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product (out of 5)

description.example: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category under which the product is listed

stock.description: Number of units available in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the reason

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 format timestamp of when the error occurred

path.description: The API endpoint path where the error happened

details.description: List of validation issues with specific fields

field.description: The name of the field with the issue

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the reason

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 format timestamp of when the error occurred
